---
title: "Extending the framework to other PD cohorts"
---

The target-trial-emulation + propensity-matching + landmark-TOST +
GLASSO-network framework is generalisable beyond PPMI. To port to
another longitudinal PD cohort:

## Required variables

| Concept | PPMI variable | Tracking-PD equivalent | ICICLE-PD equivalent |
|---|---|---|---|
| Pain | `NP1PAIN` | UPDRS Part I item 9 | UPDRS Part I item 9 |
| Motor | `updrs3_score` | UPDRS Part III total | UPDRS Part III total |
| LEDD | `LEDD` | LEDD (computed) | LEDD (computed) |
| H&Y | `NHY` | Hoehn & Yahr | Hoehn & Yahr |
| DBS exposure | `will_receive_dbs` + `dbs_date` | DBS surgery record | DBS surgery record |
| Disease duration | `duration` | symptom onset → visit | symptom onset → visit |

## Code changes required

1. Write a `load_<cohort>_long.R` analog of `load_full_ppmi_rel_patient_anchor` in `R/helpers/pain_helpers.R`.
2. Update `config.yml` to point to the new cohort's data path.
3. Re-run `make all`.

## Sensitivity analyses to add per cohort

- Cohort-specific anchor sensitivity sweep (Sprint 2).
- Cohort-specific MNAR tipping-point.
- Stratified by recruitment site if multicentre.

(Stub — to be expanded as collaborators replicate.)
